summary: First-finish smoke test of AeroSentinel dashboard. All 8 backend endpoints and all major frontend interactions verified successfully. No blockers.
passed: GET /api/kpis returns city_aqi=262, hotspots=5, rmse_model=10.21, rmse_persistence=14.01, improvement 27.1%, S2I current=5.4h vs baseline=48h (88.8% better)
GET /api/wards returns 14 wards sorted by current_aqi desc (Anand Vihar 343 → Aya Nagar lowest), schema OK
GET /api/forecast/AV?horizon=24 returns history(72), forecast(24), persistence_baseline(24), actual_holdout(24), rmse_model=13.6, rmse_persistence=20.83, improvement=34.7%

GET /api/enforcement returns 13 recommendations sorted by priority_score desc (398→...), each with evidence.hotspot_current_aqi, hotspot_forecast_peak_24h, correlated_registry_count, sample_registry_entries

POST /api/enforcement/REC-1001/acknowledge flipped status to acknowledged; persisted on next GET. Same verified for REC-1002 via UI Dispatch button (toast 'REC-1002 dispatched to field officer' shown, badge changed to ACKED)
GET /api/advisory/AV returns english (475 chars) + hindi (472 chars) with Devanagari characters confirmed
GET /api/alerts returns 5 alerts with id, ward_name, severity, headline, minutes_ago
GET /api/hotspots returns 5 entries; GET /api/registry?ward_id=AV returns 3 entries
Frontend: Dashboard loads at /, KPI strip shows kpi-city-aqi=262, kpi-hotspots=5, kpi-rmse=10.21, kpi-pending=12 (1 acked), kpi-sit=5.4h
Frontend: ward-map renders all 14 ward-node-* SVG nodes; clicking ward-node-JP and ward-node-RKP switches forecast/advisory context (title updates)
Frontend: forecast-chart renders with 4 series; rmse-badge updates per ward (13.49 vs 17.15 for JP); horizon tabs 24h/48h/72h all clickable
Frontend: enforcement-table renders 13 enforce-row-REC-* rows; clicking row expands inline evidence panel (Correlation Trace + Sample Source Records visible)
Frontend: ack-btn-REC-1002 click triggers sonner toast and row flips to ACKED badge; persistence verified visually (REC-1001 also still ACKED from earlier API call)
Frontend: advisory-panel toggles EN (475 chars) ↔ Hindi (472 chars, Devanagari confirmed) ↔ EN cleanly
No console errors, no failed network requests
notes: Ward node clicks on SVG circles require Playwright force=True due to overlapping hotspot ring siblings - this is a test-script concern only, real users click without issue. Gemini advisory took ~5s on warm cache; first cold call from earlier API hit completed in <25s.
